reference: After total thyroidectomy, your thyroid levels need to be maintained by thyroid hormone replacement. Any increase or decrease in levels beyond the hormone level range can cause problems. It is possible that your symptoms may be due to excess thyroid hormone levels since your menstrual cycles are also prolonged. However, your other symptoms could also be a result of a viral illness. It is better for you to see your doctor and get your levels tested.
